title: Request for Latest Monday Installer - 2025-10

posts.author: Meta (Meta Data)
posts.cookedHtml:
We noticed that a new release (2025-10) is listed on your Release notes. However, the following links are still downloading the older version:

  • https://monday.com/monday-msi-latest.msi

  • https://monday.com/monday-win-latest.exe

image1037×338 53.1 KB

Could you please help us with the latest version installers?

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! Welcome to the monday Community! Thanks for flagging this with us. This may need to be escalated to the monday Technical team to review. Could you please email support@monday.com so we can take a closer look at this with you?
